channel.title: DAYHACK
channel.description: 每日追踪 Product Hunt 与 GitHub 热门项目，整理产品趋势、开源工具和效率应用。

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-20
item.description: TOP1 Fuzzy AI Fuzzy AI 【标语】：We warm your prospects before reaching out 【介绍】：Cold outreach gets ignored because prospects do not know you yet. Fuzzy warms them before you ever re...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Fuzzy AI



【标语】：We warm your prospects before reaching out
【介绍】：Cold outreach gets ignored because prospects do not know you yet. Fuzzy warms them before you ever reach out by finding people already engaging in your market, helping you stay visible through content and thoughtful comments, then launching personalised LinkedIn and email campaigns in your voice. Research, enrichment, sequences, replies and team workflows live in one place. Customers call it intuitive, seamless and more comprehensive than the tools they used before.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：your,before,prospects,warm,reaching,outCold
票数： 🔺650
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月20日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-19
item.description: TOP1 OpenSEO OpenSEO 【标语】：The open source Ahrefs alternative 【介绍】：Without good data, your agent gives generic advice. Keyword research, competitor research, backlinks and site a...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 OpenSEO



【标语】：The open source Ahrefs alternative
【介绍】：Without good data, your agent gives generic advice. Keyword research, competitor research, backlinks and site audits, starting at $10/month instead of a $100-plus monthly subscription. Connect with MCP so that you can work with your agent to build an SEO strategy and write content tailored to your company.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：your,agent,research,open,source,Ahrefs
票数： 🔺709
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月19日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-18
item.description: TOP1 ZooData ZooData 【标语】：The data layer for AI agents 【介绍】：ZooData turns any URL into agent-ready JSON, so AI agents can work with structured data instead of raw HTML or bloate...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 ZooData



【标语】：The data layer for AI agents
【介绍】：ZooData turns any URL into agent-ready JSON, so AI agents can work with structured data instead of raw HTML or bloated markdown. Use ~75% fewer LLM tokens, pay only for the fields you use, and skip extra extraction credits.Beyond extraction, ZooData gives agents pre-analyzed e-commerce intelligence — competitor, market, traffic, and consumer insights — live for Amazon and TikTok. API, CLI, and MCP server included. Start with 1,000 free credits, no card required.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：data,AI,agents,extraction,credits,layer
票数： 🔺595
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月18日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-17
item.description: TOP1 Unabyss for Claude Unabyss for Claude 【标语】：Shared memory across all apps and LLMs. In Claude 【介绍】：Claude doesn't know what happens in GPT. Neither one really knows who you ...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Unabyss for Claude



【标语】：Shared memory across all apps and LLMs. In Claude
【介绍】：Claude doesn't know what happens in GPT. Neither one really knows who you are or what your company does. Now they can. Unabyss gives Claude memories from your other AI agents and everyday apps: email, Drive, GitHub, Notion, meeting recorders, and 20+ more. It saves new memories too, so GPT and Cursor stay in sync with the exact same context - sharper than wiring each tool into Claude one by one. Finally, a real memory that follows you. Private. Portable.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：memory,apps,what,GPT,your,Claude
票数： 🔺577
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月17日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-16
item.description: TOP1 Paradigm Paradigm 【标语】：Turn any goal into a personalized, adaptive learning path. 【介绍】：Paradigm reimagines education around the individual, taking any learning goal and tur...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Paradigm



【标语】：Turn any goal into a personalized, adaptive learning path.
【介绍】：Paradigm reimagines education around the individual, taking any learning goal and turning it into a step-by-step path that evolves with your progress, helping you move steadily from curiosity to mastery without getting lost.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-15
item.description: TOP1 V2Fun V2Fun 【标语】：Generate 3D character with 8K textures and AI motion capture 【介绍】：V2Fun is an AI 3D creation platform built with self-developed 3D modeling and AI motion c...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 V2Fun



【标语】：Generate 3D character with 8K textures and AI motion capture
【介绍】：V2Fun is an AI 3D creation platform built with self-developed 3D modeling and AI motion capture models. It helps creators turn images, prompts, and videos into high-quality 3D models, enhance assets with advanced 8K texture generation, and create motion-ready characters without switching between separate modeling, texturing, and mocap tools. V2Fun also supports image generation through models including Nano Banana and others, so creators can explore visual concepts and bring them into 3D faster.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：3D,AI,motion,models,8K,modeling
票数： 🔺646
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月15日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-14
item.description: TOP1 ClawTeams ClawTeams 【标语】：The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce 【介绍】：ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring special...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 ClawTeams



【标语】：The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
【介绍】：ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring specialists—or doing everything yourself—you get a coordinated AI team that thinks, plans, and executes like real employees. One goal. One team. Zero micromanagement. Tell your team lead what you want—"Increase Q4 revenue by 20%"—and they break it down, assign specialists, and run the plan. You get updates in Slack or Discord. High-stakes decisions wait for your approval. Everything else just happens.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：team,AI,goal,specialists,get,your
票数： 🔺723
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月14日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-13
item.description: TOP1 AgentKey AgentKey 【标语】：One-stop live data marketplace for your agent 【介绍】：AgentKey is a plugin that connects your agent to live external data in one command. Install it int...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 AgentKey



【标语】：One-stop live data marketplace for your agent
【介绍】：AgentKey is a plugin that connects your agent to live external data in one command. Install it into Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any MCP-based agent and instantly unlock access to search, web pages, social platforms, finance, e-commerce, business and crypto data. No integrations. No setup. Auto failover keeps workflows running.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：data,live,your,agent,No,stop
票数： 🔺650
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月13日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-12
item.description: TOP1 Miora Miora 【标语】：Scale your creativity on editable canvas with agent memory 【介绍】：Not another AI image tool. Miora is an Agentic Creative Studio with Memory. Bring one idea,...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Miora



【标语】：Scale your creativity on editable canvas with agent memory
【介绍】：Not another AI image tool. Miora is an Agentic Creative Studio with Memory. Bring one idea, generate multimodal assets on one editable canvas, turn auto-built memory into a reusable Skill, then create more, always true to your taste. One person, a whole creative studio.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：your,editable,canvas,Scale,creativity,agent
票数： 🔺567
是否精选：是

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-11
item.description: TOP1 Effects SDK Effects SDK 【标语】：AI video & audio effects SDK for real-time apps 【介绍】：Effects SDK helps developers add production-ready AI video and audio effects to web, deskt...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Effects SDK



【标语】：AI video & audio effects SDK for real-time apps
【介绍】：Effects SDK helps developers add production-ready AI video and audio effects to web, desktop, and mobile apps. Add background blur, virtual backgrounds, smart framing, lighting correction, beautification, overlays, avatars, and real-time noise suppression — all running client-side, without sending video or audio to our servers.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：video,audio,AI,effects,SDK,real
票数： 🔺459
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月11日 PM03:01 (北京时间)
